title: WordPress theme update breaks homepage layout
description: After updating to Twenty Twenty-Five child theme v1.2, the homepage hero section collapsed. CSS override in child theme stylesheet needs review.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: Contact Form 7 not sending email notifications
description: CF7 submissions not triggering emails to secretary@shilohbaptistbiloxi.org. SMTP configuration issue with WP Mail SMTP plugin.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: Migrate sermon archive to Webflow CMS
description: Export sermon posts from WordPress and import into Webflow CMS collection. Map custom fields: date, pastor, scripture reference, audio URL.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: Set up Webflow project for site redesign
description: Initialize Webflow project for shilohbaptistbiloxi.org redesign. CMS collections: Sermons, Events, Staff, Blog Posts. Configure custom domain and SSL.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: Online giving page - Stripe integration
description: Integrate Stripe Checkout on the /give page. Three giving categories: Tithes & Offerings, Building Fund, Missions. Receipt confirmation email required.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: Mobile layout broken on iOS 17 - nav menu overlap
description: On iPhone running iOS 17, the sticky navigation bar overlaps the page title on inner pages. z-index stacking context needs correction in Webflow.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: SSL certificate renewal for legacy subdomain
description: The legacy.shilohbaptistbiloxi.org SSL cert expires 2027-01-14. Certbot renewal cron on shiloh-web-01 needs verification. Cloudflare API token issue.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: Accessibility audit - missing alt text on gallery images
description: WCAG 2.1 AA: Photo Gallery page has ~45 images without alt text. Add descriptive alt attributes to all images in Webflow CMS gallery collection.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: WordPress plugin updates - November 2026
description: Plugin updates pending: WP Mail SMTP 4.1.2, Yoast SEO 23.4, WP Super Cache 1.12.1, Wordfence 8.0.2, Contact Form 7 5.9.8. Test on staging first.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: Webflow homepage hero redesign
description: Redesign homepage hero section with new church banner image from October 2026 outdoor service. Updated tagline: 'Welcome Home to Shiloh'. Needs Pastor Wilkins review before publish.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: Events calendar plugin - update for 2026 schedule
description: Update The Events Calendar plugin with 2026 events: VBS June 22-26, Church Picnic July 4, Back-to-School Prayer Aug 17, Fall Revival Sept 14-17, Homecoming Oct 11, Thanksgiving Nov 26, Christmas Cantata Dec 13.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: Weekly bulletin PDF upload system
description: Create bulletin PDF upload workflow. Going with Webflow CMS Bulletins collection. Gloria Tate to manage uploads each Friday via Webflow Editor.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: Prayer request form not delivering submissions
description: Prayer request form on /prayer not forwarding to pastor@shilohbaptistbiloxi.org. Webflow form notifications and SMTP relay need investigation.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: Staff directory - add associate pastor bio
description: Add Rev. Darnell Hooks (Associate Pastor, joined March 2026) to /staff page. Need headshot and bio from church office.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: Google PageSpeed score below 70 on mobile
description: Homepage scores 58/100 mobile on PageSpeed Insights. Issues: 2.1MB hero JPEG, render-blocking scripts, 420KB Google Fonts. WebP conversion and font-display:swap needed.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: VBS 2026 volunteer signup form
description: Create Webflow form at /vbs-volunteers. Fields: name, email, phone, age group, dietary restrictions, background check consent. Route to vbs@shilohbaptistbiloxi.org.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: WordPress core update to 6.7
description: WordPress 6.7 available. Test on staging, backup database before production apply. Check Gutenberg block compatibility.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: Social media feed embed on homepage
description: Add Instagram/Facebook feed on homepage. Going with custom Instagram oEmbed - lighter than Smash Balloon plugin. Needs Instagram Business account connected.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: Children ministry page - update curriculum info
description: Update /childrens-ministry with 2026 curriculum: Kingdom Kids (ages 3-5), Roots & Wings (ages 6-10). New teacher roster for Sunday School and Wednesday night.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: Church history page - 75th anniversary content update
description: Pastor Wilkins has provided revised /history page copy for the 75th anniversary. Upload new text and anniversary photo collage (provided as ZIP by church secretary).
author: calvin-hargrove
